plugins.name: Vital
plugins.description: Spectral warping wavetable synthesizer with a powerful modulation system, 3 oscillators, and detailed visual feedback on every parameter.

plugins.name: Surge XT
plugins.description: Open-source hybrid synthesizer with extensive modulation capabilities, 300+ factory patches, and support for multiple synthesis types.

plugins.name: Dexed
plugins.description: FM synthesizer plugin modeled after the Yamaha DX7, fully compatible with original DX7 SysEx patch banks.

plugins.name: Odin 2
plugins.description: Semi-modular synthesizer with 3 oscillators offering wavetable, FM, PM, and PM-FM synthesis options plus a flexible modulation matrix.

plugins.name: OB-Xd
plugins.description: Virtual analog synthesizer modeled after the Oberheim OB-X with 4-voice polyphony, two oscillators, and classic warm analog sound.

plugins.name: TAL-NoiseMaker
plugins.description: Virtual analog synthesizer with 3 oscillators, 2 filters, built-in arpeggiator, and stereo chorus — excellent for classic electronic tones.

plugins.name: Helm
plugins.description: Polyphonic synthesizer with a clean, modern interface featuring multiple oscillator types, flexible routing, and a built-in effects rack.

plugins.name: TDR Nova
plugins.description: Parallel dynamic equalizer combining classic parametric EQ with transparent multiband dynamics processing — ideal for mixing and mastering.

plugins.name: TAL-Reverb-4
plugins.description: High quality plate reverb with a beautiful vintage character, simple control set, and lush long tails.

plugins.name: SPAN
plugins.description: Real-time FFT audio spectrum analyzer with adjustable display range, resolution, and multiple display modes for precise frequency analysis.

plugins.name: Limiter No6
plugins.description: Multi-stage limiter featuring RMS compressor, high-frequency limiter, clipper, and true peak limiter for transparent loudness maximization.

plugins.name: Ozone Imager 2
plugins.description: Stereo imaging plugin for widening or narrowing the stereo field with Lissajous metering and frequency-dependent processing.

plugins.name: DragonflyReverb
plugins.description: Open-source collection of four reverb types — room, hall, early reflections, and plate — all with high-quality algorithms.

plugins.name: MFreeFXBundle
plugins.description: Collection of 37 free audio plugins covering EQ, dynamics, modulation, analysis, and more — all with MeldaProduction's signature quality.

plugins.name: TAL-Chorus-LX
plugins.description: Emulation of the Roland Juno-60 chorus effect with two modes — adds the iconic lush, warm stereo spread to any signal.
